title: Aehr Test Systems Tops Daily Volume as Shares Surge on AI Hopes
text: Aehr Test Systems surged to the top of daily trading volume as investors rush to capitalize on AI infrastructure trends. The stock benefited from the company's announcement of major hyperscaler customer wins and analyst upgrades predicting 71% revenue growth in fiscal 2027. The surge reflects broader market enthusiasm for semiconductor equipment suppliers positioned to benefit from AI chip manufacturing buildout. Aehr's unique position in wafer-level and package-level burn-in testing for advanced semiconductors makes it a key component of AI infrastructure supply chains. Institutional investors have increased positions following the analyst upgrades.
